title: carum heyneanum
intro: Carum heyneanum, also known as Indian parsley or Carum, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carum heyneanum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Carum heyneanum is often used in the form of oil, powder, or decoction, and it is also used as a flavoring agent in traditional Indian cuisine.
